seed_instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules.
new_constraint: The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules. Avoid using the word "timetable." The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Bus Service Schedules - [Your Origin City] to [Your Destination City]

Dear [Bus Company Name] Customer Service Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am planning some travel soon and would like to inquire about the current service offerings between [Your Origin City] and [Your Destination City]. Could you please provide me with information regarding the available departure and arrival times for this route?

I am trying to compare options, so knowing the complete operational schedule would be very helpful. If you have an online portal or a PDF document containing the current service hours, I would be grateful if you could direct me to it.

I was hoping to see the full rundown, as sometimes the printed timetable can be confusing to interpret without context. Furthermore, I need to check if the service frequency matches my requirements, so having the most up-to-date timetable would be much appreciated.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this request. I look forward to hearing from you soon with the relevant schedule details.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number (Optional)]<turn|>
